RepurpOS

Colorectal Cancer

Disease intelligence for Colorectal Cancer: 190 alterations and 1212 ranked therapeutics from curated public databases.

US DALYs1.58MWHO GHE 2021 · all ages
Global DALYs23.83MWHO GHE 2021 · worldwide
US mortality62.5K deaths/yrWHO GHE 2021
Global mortality945.2K deaths/yrWHO GHE 2021 · worldwide

Sources: Open Targets, HPO, ClinicalTrials.gov, DGIdb, ChEMBL, PubMed Literature, PubMed NP, ClinicalTrials.gov NP · Pipeline phase 7 · Updated 2026-07-05

Remission & chronicity

Spontaneous remission
Essentially zero; 5-year survival stage I: ~90% (resectable); stage IV: ~15% overall, ~20-30% with modern therapy and liver metastasis resection
Best-intervention remission
Stage I-III with surgery + adjuvant chemotherapy: 60-80% 5-year survival; MSI-H/dMMR CRC: pembrolizumab first-line achieves ~55% 5-year PFS vs ~16% with chemotherapy (KEYNOTE-177); complete tumour regression with neoadjuvant therapy in rectal cancer (watch-and-wait): 15-30% complete pathological response allowing organ preservation
Drug-free remission
—
Relapse after remission
—
Chronicity
—
Gap size
Large screening gap: only 60-68% of US adults up-to-date with CRC screening; large treatment gap for MSI-H biomarker testing
Primary barrier
access/practice
Barrier detail: Colonoscopy screening is dramatically underused despite proven 60-70% mortality reduction; stool-based tests (FIT, Cologuard) improving uptake but sensitivity/specificity inferior; biomarker testing for MSI/MMR status still not universal; palliative colostomy vs sphincter-preserving approaches vary widely by provider

Last SoC change: 2023 — pembrolizumab first-line for MSI-H/dMMR mCRC standard of care (KEYNOTE-177); LONSURF (trifluridine/tipiracil) and fruquintinib for refractory disease; bevacizumab + FOLFOX/FOLFIRI backbone since 2004 essentially unchanged; EGFR inhibitors (cetuximab) in RAS wild-type since 2012

Remission data layers: disease_db_100 · source-locked manual data · confidence: high

Identifiers: MONDO: MONDO:0005575 · ORPHA: ORPHA:157794

INDOMETHACIN Small molecule Approved Strong 100
6 trials 2 Trial pubs 2 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT00473980 — Preoperative Non-steroidal Anti-inflammatory Drugs(NSAID) to Colorectal Cancer Patients (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT02958566 — Multimodal Narcotic Limited Perioperative Pain Control With Colorectal Surgery (UNKNOWN) PHASE4
  • NCT06837831 — Mepilex Lite Dressings for the Treatment of Acute Radiation Dermatitis of Anal Canal Skin (RECRUITING) NA
  • NCT00002796 — Phase I-II Study of Fluorouracil in Combination With Phenylbutyrate in Advanced Colorectal Cancer (TERMINATED) PHASE1, PHASE2
  • NCT05782608 — IV Ibuprofen vs Ketorolac in Post Operative Pain in Colorectal Cancer Surgeries in Obese Patient (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT01719926 — Phase I Platinum Based Chemotherapy Plus Indomethacin (COMPLETED) PHASE1

Published literature

  • Clinical trial publication Receptor and enzyme expression for prostanoid metabolism in colorectal cancer related to tumor tissue PGE2 (International journal of oncology, 2010)
  • Clinical trial publication Preoperative treatment with a non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) increases tumor tissue infiltration of seemingly activated immune cells in colorectal cancer (Cancer immunity, 2008)

  • Cochrane review Efficacy and safety of first-line targeted and immunotherapy for metastatic colorectal cancer: a network meta-analysis (Frontiers in immunology, 2025)

  • Meta-analysis Comparative efficacy of later-line therapies for metastatic colorectal cancer: a network meta-analysis of survival curves (Expert review of pharmacoeconomics & outcomes research, 2024)
  • Clinical trial publication Efficacy and safety of atezolizumab plus bevacizumab in MSI-like metastatic colorectal cancer: a multicenter, single-arm, phase II, open-label clinical trial (ESMO open, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Zanzalintinib plus atezolizumab versus regorafenib in refractory colorectal cancer (STELLAR-303): a randomised, open-label, phase 3 trial (Lancet (London, England), 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Liver metastases do not predict resistance to the addition of atezolizumab to first-line FOLFOXIRI plus bevacizumab in proficient MMR metastatic colorectal cancer: a secondary analysis of the AtezoTRIBE study (ESMO open, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Upfront Fluorouracil, Leucovorin, Oxaliplatin, and Irinotecan Plus Bevacizumab With or Without Atezolizumab for Patients With Metastatic Colorectal Cancer: Updated and Overall Survival Results of the ATEZOTRIBE Study (Journal of clinical oncology : official journal of the American Society of Clinical Oncology, 2024)
  • Clinical trial publication Efficacy and Safety of Atezolizumab and Bevacizumab in Appendiceal Adenocarcinoma (Cancer research communications, 2024)
  • Randomized controlled trial An Immune-Related Gene Expression Signature Predicts Benefit from Adding Atezolizumab to FOLFOXIRI plus Bevacizumab in Metastatic Colorectal Cancer (Clinical cancer research : an official journal of the American Association for Cancer Research, 2023)

  • Cochrane review Therapeutic targeting of PD-1/PD-L1 and CTLA-4 in colorectal cancer: tumor-intrinsic and immune checkpoint signaling (Expert opinion on biological therapy, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Safety and Efficacy of Nivolumab Plus Ipilimumab in Microsatellite Instability-High/Mismatch Repair-Deficient Colorectal Cancer: A Systematic Review (Clinical oncology (Royal College of Radiologists (Great Britain)), 2026)

  • Meta-analysis Cost-utility analysis of pembrolizumab versus nivolumab in the treatment of metastatic colorectal cancer from the perspective of the healthcare payer (International journal of clinical pharmacology and therapeutics, 2025)
  • Meta-analysis Evaluation of the efficacy and safety of first- and second-line immunotherapy in patients with metastatic colorectal cancer: a systematic review and network meta-analysis based on randomized controlled trials (Frontiers in immunology, 2024)
  • Meta-analysis Clinical benefits of PD-1/PD-L1 inhibitors in patients with metastatic colorectal cancer: a systematic review and meta-analysis (World journal of surgical oncology, 2022)
  • Systematic review Neoadjuvant Immune Checkpoint Inhibition in MSI-H/dMMR Colorectal Cancer: A Systematic Review of Prospective Trials Evaluating Efficacy, Pathologic Response, and Surgical Outcomes (Journal of gastrointestinal cancer, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Carcinoembryonic Antigen Flare Under Oxaliplatin-Based Chemotherapy Predicts Benefit from Nivolumab in Metastatic Microsatellite-Stable Colorectal Cancer - A Post Hoc Analysis of METIMMOX Trial Data (ImmunoTargets and therapy, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication Nivolumab Plus Ipilimumab in Patients With Solid Tumors With High Tumor Mutation Burden: Results From the Targeted Agent and Profiling Utilization Registry Study (JCO precision oncology, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication First-line Nivolumab plus FOLFOXIRI/Bevacizumab in advanced RAS/BRAF-mutated colorectal cancer: efficacy, safety and biomarker discovery from the phase II NIVACOR trial (Nature communications, 2026)

  • Cochrane review Hand-foot skin reaction as a positive prognostic factor in vascular endothelial growth factor receptor-tyrosine kinase inhibitor treatment (British journal of pharmacology, 2026)
  • Cochrane review Health economic evaluation of stereotactic body radiotherapy (SBRT) for hepatocellular carcinoma: a systematic review (Cost effectiveness and resource allocation : C/E, 2020)
  • Cochrane review Risk of treatment-related deaths with vascular endothelial growth factor receptor tyrosine kinase inhibitors: a meta-analysis of 41 randomized controlled trials (OncoTargets and therapy, 2014)

  • Clinical trial publication Activity of Sorafenib Plus Capecitabine in Previously Treated Metastatic Colorectal Cancer (The oncologist, 2021)
  • Clinical trial publication Sorafenib Plus Irinotecan Combination in Patients With RAS-mutated Metastatic Colorectal Cancer Refractory To Standard Combined Chemotherapies: A Multicenter, Randomized Phase 2 Trial (NEXIRI-2/PRODIGE 27) (Clinical colorectal cancer, 2020)
  • Clinical trial publication Monitoring metabolic response using FDG PET-CT during targeted therapy for metastatic colorectal cancer (European journal of nuclear medicine and molecular imaging, 2016)
  • Randomized controlled trial Sorafenib in combination with oxaliplatin, leucovorin, and fluorouracil (modified FOLFOX6) as first-line treatment of metastatic colorectal cancer: the RESPECT trial (Clinical cancer research : an official journal of the American Association for Cancer Research, 2013)

6 trials 2 Trial pubs 2 RCT
View evidence

Registry trials

  • NCT00473980 — Preoperative Non-steroidal Anti-inflammatory Drugs(NSAID) to Colorectal Cancer Patients (COMPLETED) PHASE4
  • NCT02958566 — Multimodal Narcotic Limited Perioperative Pain Control With Colorectal Surgery (UNKNOWN) PHASE4
  • NCT06837831 — Mepilex Lite Dressings for the Treatment of Acute Radiation Dermatitis of Anal Canal Skin (RECRUITING) NA
  • NCT00002796 — Phase I-II Study of Fluorouracil in Combination With Phenylbutyrate in Advanced Colorectal Cancer (TERMINATED) PHASE1, PHASE2
  • NCT05782608 — IV Ibuprofen vs Ketorolac in Post Operative Pain in Colorectal Cancer Surgeries in Obese Patient (COMPLETED) NA
  • NCT01719926 — Phase I Platinum Based Chemotherapy Plus Indomethacin (COMPLETED) PHASE1

Published literature

  • Clinical trial publication Receptor and enzyme expression for prostanoid metabolism in colorectal cancer related to tumor tissue PGE2 (International journal of oncology, 2010)
  • Clinical trial publication Preoperative treatment with a non-steroidal anti-inflammatory drug (NSAID) increases tumor tissue infiltration of seemingly activated immune cells in colorectal cancer (Cancer immunity, 2008)

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Efficacy and safety of first-line targeted and immunotherapy for metastatic colorectal cancer: a network meta-analysis (Frontiers in immunology, 2025)
  • Cochrane review The efficacy of targeted therapy and/or immunotherapy with or without chemotherapy in patients with colorectal cancer: A network meta-analysis (European journal of pharmacology, 2025)
  • Cochrane review Evaluation of the efficacy and safety of first- and second-line immunotherapy in patients with metastatic colorectal cancer: a systematic review and network meta-analysis based on randomized controlled trials (Frontiers in immunology, 2024)
  • Cochrane review First line therapy in stage IV BRAF mutated colorectal cancer (Heliyon, 2024)
  • Cochrane review A network meta-analysis of efficacy and safety for first-line and maintenance therapies in patients with unresectable colorectal liver metastases (Frontiers in pharmacology, 2024)
  • Meta-analysis Comparative efficacy of later-line therapies for metastatic colorectal cancer: a network meta-analysis of survival curves (Expert review of pharmacoeconomics & outcomes research, 2024)
  • Clinical trial publication Efficacy and safety of atezolizumab plus bevacizumab in MSI-like metastatic colorectal cancer: a multicenter, single-arm, phase II, open-label clinical trial (ESMO open, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Zanzalintinib plus atezolizumab versus regorafenib in refractory colorectal cancer (STELLAR-303): a randomised, open-label, phase 3 trial (Lancet (London, England), 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Liver metastases do not predict resistance to the addition of atezolizumab to first-line FOLFOXIRI plus bevacizumab in proficient MMR metastatic colorectal cancer: a secondary analysis of the AtezoTRIBE study (ESMO open, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Upfront Fluorouracil, Leucovorin, Oxaliplatin, and Irinotecan Plus Bevacizumab With or Without Atezolizumab for Patients With Metastatic Colorectal Cancer: Updated and Overall Survival Results of the ATEZOTRIBE Study (Journal of clinical oncology : official journal of the American Society of Clinical Oncology, 2024)
  • Clinical trial publication Efficacy and Safety of Atezolizumab and Bevacizumab in Appendiceal Adenocarcinoma (Cancer research communications, 2024)
  • Randomized controlled trial An Immune-Related Gene Expression Signature Predicts Benefit from Adding Atezolizumab to FOLFOXIRI plus Bevacizumab in Metastatic Colorectal Cancer (Clinical cancer research : an official journal of the American Association for Cancer Research, 2023)

Published literature

  • Cochrane review Safety and Efficacy of Triple Therapy Containing Encorafenib, Cetuximab, and Binimetinib for BRAF V600E-Mutated Colorectal Cancer: a Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis (Journal of gastrointestinal cancer, 2026)
  • Cochrane review The efficacy of targeted therapy and/or immunotherapy with or without chemotherapy in patients with colorectal cancer: A network meta-analysis (European journal of pharmacology, 2025)
  • Systematic review Systematic review of randomised clinical trials and observational studies for patients with RAS wild-type or BRAF(V600E)-mutant metastatic and/or unresectable colorectal cancer (Critical reviews in oncology/hematology, 2022)
  • Clinical trial publication Safety and efficacy of lapatinib, binimetinib, and vinorelbine for RAS mutant metastatic colorectal cancer: results of the RASTRIC Phase I/II trial (British journal of cancer, 2026)
  • Clinical trial publication A Phase Ia/b study of MEK1/2 inhibitor binimetinib with MET inhibitor crizotinib in patients with RAS mutant advanced colorectal cancer (MErCuRIC) (BMC cancer, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Molecular profiling of BRAF-V600E-mutant metastatic colorectal cancer in the phase 3 BEACON CRC trial (Nature medicine, 2024)
  • Clinical trial publication A Phase II Study of Potentiation of Pembrolizumab with Binimetinib and Bevacizumab in Refractory Microsatellite-Stable Colorectal Cancer (Clinical cancer research : an official journal of the American Association for Cancer Research, 2024)
  • Clinical trial publication Pembrolizumab Plus Binimetinib With or Without Chemotherapy for MSS/pMMR Metastatic Colorectal Cancer: Outcomes From KEYNOTE-651 Cohorts A, C, and E (Clinical colorectal cancer, 2024)
  • Randomized controlled trial Binimetinib in combination with nivolumab or nivolumab and ipilimumab in patients with previously treated microsatellite-stable metastatic colorectal cancer with RAS mutations in an open-label phase 1b/2 study (BMC cancer, 2024)
  • Randomized controlled trial Quality of life with encorafenib plus cetuximab with or without binimetinib treatment in patients with BRAF V600E-mutant metastatic colorectal cancer: patient-reported outcomes from BEACON CRC (ESMO open, 2022)
  • Randomized controlled trial Encorafenib Plus Cetuximab as a New Standard of Care for Previously Treated BRAF V600E-Mutant Metastatic Colorectal Cancer: Updated Survival Results and Subgroup Analyses from the BEACON Study (Journal of clinical oncology : official journal of the American Society of Clinical Oncology, 2021)

  • Cochrane review Review of Network Meta-Analyses on the Efficacy of Chemopreventive Agents on Colorectal Adenomas and Cancer (Cancer control : journal of the Moffitt Cancer Center, 2025)

  • Cochrane review Effects of aspirin and non-aspirin nonsteroidal anti-inflammatory drugs on the incidence of recurrent colorectal adenomas: a systematic review with meta-analysis and trial sequential analysis of randomized clinical trials (BMC cancer, 2017)

  • Cochrane review Chemoprevention of colorectal cancer: systematic review and economic evaluation (Health technology assessment (Winchester, England), 2010)
  • Meta-analysis Selective COX-2 inhibitors do not increase gastrointestinal reactions after colorectal cancer surgery: a systematic review and meta-analysis (BMC gastroenterology, 2023)
  • Meta-analysis The efficacy of chemopreventive agents on the incidence of colorectal adenomas: A systematic review and network meta-analysis (Preventive medicine, 2022)
  • Meta-analysis Very-low-dose aspirin and surveillance colonoscopy is cost-effective in secondary prevention of colorectal cancer in individuals with advanced adenomas: network meta-analysis and cost-effectiveness analysis (BMC gastroenterology, 2021)
  • Systematic review Chemoprevention of Gastrointestinal Cancers: An Umbrella Review of Meta-Analyses of Randomized Controlled Trials and Cohort Studies (Clinical and translational science, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Protective effect of celecoxib against capecitabine induced hand and foot syndrome in patients with colorectal Cancer (Cancer chemotherapy and pharmacology, 2025)
  • Clinical trial publication Improved Survival With Adjuvant Cyclooxygenase 2 Inhibition in PIK3CA-Activated Stage III Colon Cancer: CALGB/SWOG 80702 (Alliance) (Journal of clinical oncology : official journal of the American Society of Clinical Oncology, 2024)
  • Clinical trial publication Celecoxib as an adjuvant to chemotherapy for patients with metastatic colorectal cancer: A randomized controlled clinical study (Saudi medical journal, 2022)

  • Clinical trial publication A phase II clinical study of combining FOLFIRI and bevacizumab plus erlotinib in 2nd-line chemotherapy for patients with metastatic colorectal cancer (Medicine, 2017)
  • Clinical trial publication Phase II trial of capecitabine plus erlotinib versus capecitabine alone in patients with advanced colorectal cancer (Future oncology (London, England), 2017)

Alterations and therapeutics are aggregated from public databases (Open Targets, HPO, ChEMBL, DGIdb, and others). Natural agents are candidates from OSMF narrative reviews on opensourcemed.info/chronic-disease.html — not approved treatments. This page is for research orientation only — not medical advice.
